author: Ravi Shankar

pipeline_steps.name: Enrich company profile
pipeline_steps.description: Look up the new customer's domain to pull firmographic data — industry, employee count, funding stage
pipeline_steps.on_error: skip enrichment, tag account as needs-manual-review

pipeline_steps.name: Provision workspace
pipeline_steps.description: Create the customer's tenant workspace with default settings based on their plan tier
pipeline_steps.input: plan_tier, company_name, admin_email from enrichment result

pipeline_steps.name: Generate welcome sequence
pipeline_steps.description: Use the LLM to draft a personalized 5-email welcome sequence based on industry and company size
pipeline_steps.on_error: fall back to generic welcome template set

pipeline_steps.name: Schedule onboarding call
pipeline_steps.description: Book a 30-minute onboarding call with the assigned CSM within the next 3 business days
pipeline_steps.on_error: send fallback email with self-serve booking link

pipeline_steps.name: Sync to CRM
pipeline_steps.description: Create or update the Account and Contact records in Salesforce with enriched data and workspace ID
pipeline_steps.on_error: queue for manual CRM entry, log to dead letter

pipeline_steps.name: Send welcome email
pipeline_steps.description: Dispatch the first email of the welcome sequence with login credentials and onboarding call details
pipeline_steps.depends_on: Generate welcome sequence, Schedule onboarding call

error_strategy: Fail-forward with compensation — each step defines its own fallback; pipeline continues unless a critical step (Provision workspace) fails
output_schema_description: On success: { customer_id, workspace_id, csm_name, onboarding_call_utc, emails_scheduled: 5, crm_synced: true }. On failure: { customer_id, failed_step, error_message, compensation_actions_taken }.
